headline: Elon Musk's Hypothetical 'America Party' Gains Support From 40% of Voters
summary: A new poll reveals that 40% of U.S. voters would be inclined to support a political party launched by Elon Musk.

headline: Elon Musk Renews Demand for Jeffrey Epstein Files Release, Weeks After Alleging Trump Is Named in Them
summary: Elon Musk has once again demanded the release of the unredacted Jeffrey Epstein files. This comes in the wake of his allegations against President Trump.

headline: Elon Musk And Tom Cruise Once Planned On Making A Movie In Space Using SpaceX Rockets
summary: As Elon Musk's Mars ambitions could be delayed, an old video of Musk discussing potential Tom Cruise movie in space resurfaces.

headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: The Benzinga Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks that saw increased interest from readers during the week and a look at the potential catalysts driving momentum.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Datadog, Centene, Lucid — And US Makes Surprise Trade Deal With Vietnam
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: US Air Force Suspends SpaceX Cargo Rocket Project In Pacific Over Ecological Concerns
summary: Citing environmental concerns, the US Air Force has decided to suspend SpaceX's hypersonic rocket cargo tests.

headline: Google's AI Overviews Features Sparks New Antitrust Battle With European Publishers: Report
summary: An antitrust complaint was filed by a group of independent publishers from European Union against Google, alleging misuse of its AI Overviews.

headline: Trump's 'Big Beautiful Bill' Passes—EV Tax Breaks To End On September 30: What It Means For Electric Vehicles
summary: Trump's One Big, Beautiful Bill passes House of Representatives, ends federal EV tax credit, fines on CAFE and USPS EV fleet overhaul.
